channel.title: Compression on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Compression on Arrans github.io

item.title: Lymphatus/caesium-image-compressor
item.description: Caesium is an image compression software that helps you store, send and share digital pictures, supporting JPG, PNG, WebP and TIFF formats. You can quickly reduce the file size (and resolution, if you want) by preserving the overall quality of the image.

item.title: peazip/PeaZip
item.description: Free Zip / Unzip software and Rar file extractor. Cross-platform file and archive manager. Features volume spanning, compression, authenticated encryption. Supports 7Z, 7-Zip sfx, ACE, ARJ, Brotli, BZ2, CAB, CHM, CPIO, DEB, GZ, ISO, JAR, LHA/LZH, NSIS, OOo, PAQ/LPAQ, PEA, QUAD, RAR, RPM, split, TAR, Z, ZIP, ZIPX, Zstandard.

item.title: ulikunitz/xz
item.description: Pure golang package for reading and writing xz-compressed files
